goal: Implement immutable, append-only audit trail with event listeners, query API, and CSV export

tasks.name: AuditEvent Entity + Repository
tasks.action: Create immutable AuditEvent entity (actor, action, entityType, entityId, before/after JSON, timestamp). AuditAction enum. Repository with cursor pagination and filters.

tasks.name: Audit Event Listener + Service
tasks.action: AuditService for logging and querying. AuditEventListener with @TransactionalEventListener for all AuditableEvent subtypes. JSON serialization of snapshots.

tasks.name: Audit REST API + Liquibase
tasks.action: AuditController at /api/v1/audit (ADMIN/TREASURER). Cursor-paginated list, entity trail, CSV export. Liquibase for audit_events table with indexes.

commitMessage: feat(audit): implement immutable audit trail with event listeners and query API
